institution.name: The University of Texas at Tyler

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas at Tyler rose 44% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.3k → $9.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Texas at Tyler rose 65% between 2021 and 2024 (26.8% → 44.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at The University of Texas at Tyler rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (42.2% → 54.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The University of Texas at Tyler rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (61.9% → 76.8%).
